.mosaic-provider-reportcontent-1hfwffs{box-sizing:border-box;background:none;appearance:none;text-align:start;text-decoration:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;user-select:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;position:relative;margin-block-start:0;margin-block-end:0;margin-inline-start:0;margin-inline-end:0;padding-inline-start:1rem;padding-inline-end:1rem;line-height:1.5;font-family:'Indeed Sans','Noto Sans','Helvetica Neue',Helvetica,Arial,'Liberation Sans',Roboto,Noto,sans-serif;font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;border-radius:0.75rem;transition:border-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.645, 0.045, 0.355, 1),background-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.645, 0.045, 0.355, 1),opacity 200ms cubic-bezier(0.645, 0.045, 0.355, 1),box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.645, 0.045, 0.355, 1),color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.645, 0.045, 0.355, 1),z-index 200ms cubic-bezier(0.645, 0.045, 0.355, 1);display:inline-flex;inline-size:auto;padding-block-start:0.5625rem;padding-block-end:0.5625rem;min-block-size:2.75rem;color:var(--ifl-colors-foreground-strong);background-color:var(--ifl-colors-background-action-weak);}.mosaic-provider-reportcontent .mosaic-provider-reportcontent-1hfwffs::-moz-focus-inner{border:0;}@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce){.mosaic-provider-reportcontent .mosaic-provider-reportcontent-1hfwffs{transition:none;}}.mosaic-provider-reportcontent .mosaic-provider-reportcontent-1hfwffs:disabled{opacity:0.4;pointer-events:none;}.mosaic-provider-reportcontent .mosaic-provider-reportcontent-1hfwffs:focus-visible{outline:none;box-shadow:var(--ifl-shadows-focus);}.mosaic-provider-reportcontent .mosaic-provider-reportcontent-1hfwffs[aria-disabled='true']{cursor:default;}.mosaic-provider-reportcontent .mosaic-provider-reportcontent-1hfwffs:visited{color:var(--ifl-colors-foreground-strong);}.mosaic-provider-reportcontent .mosaic-provider-reportcontent-1hfwffs:hover:not([aria-disabled='true']){color:var(--ifl-colors-foreground-strong);background-color:var(--ifl-colors-background-action-weak-hover);}.mosaic-provider-reportcontent .mosaic-provider-reportcontent-1hfwffs:active:not([aria-disabled='true']){color:var(--ifl-colors-foreground-strong);box-shadow:var(--ifl-shadows-inset);background-color:var(--ifl-colors-background-action-weak-active);}.mosaic-provider-reportcontent                 <svg id="preloader" width="150" height="1" viewBox="0 0 150 1">
                    <path id="loading-line-bkgd" d="M0,0 L150,0" fill="none" stroke="#F3F2F1" stroke-width="150"></path>
                    <style>
                        #loading-line-main {
                            stroke-dasharray: 150;
                            stroke-dashoffset: 150;
                        }
                        @keyframes animateLine {
                            to {
                                stroke-dashoffset: 0;
                            }
                        }
                        #loading-line-main {
                            animation: animateLine 2s linear infinite;
                        }
                    </style>
                    <path id="loading-line-main" d="M0,0 L150,0" fill="none" stroke="#003A9B" stroke-width="20"></path>
                </svg>

        <style>
            .screenreader-text:focus {
                height: auto;
                width: auto;
                opacity: 1;
                position: static;
                overflow: visible;
            }
        </style>
        <a id="skip-nav" class="screenreader-text" href="#gnav-header-end" style="color: black; position: absolute; width: 1px; height: 1px; opacity: 0; overflow: hidden;">

Industries, Inc."},"feed":{"__typename":"JobFeed","key":"AAAAAa66nDWlRBGBbKfivQJzjorBRV26a6wLrCc7D60xD26DZWXYIw==","isDradis":false,"feedSourceType":"EMPLOYER"},"url":"https:\u002F\u002Fjobs.altec.com\u002Fjobs\u002F17714915-core-controls-developer?tm_job=36428-1A&tm_event=view&tm_company=2475","dateOnIndeed":1778314669130,"description":{"__typename":"JobDescription","html":"\u003Cdiv>\u003Cp>\u003Cb>Why Join Altec?\u003C\u002Fb>\n\u003C\u002Fp>\u003Cp>Altec is looking for \u003Cb>Controls Developer\u003C\u002Fb> to join the team located in St. Joseph, Mo. As a Controls Developer you will design, build, and test customer-specific electrical systems, and design using simulation and model-based design.\u003Cbr>\n\u003C\u002Fp>\u003Cp>\u003Cbr>\nCustomer First - Enjoyment of Work - Family- Financial Stability - Integrity - People Are Our Greatest Strength - Quality - Spiritual Development - Teamwork\u003C\u002Fp>\u003Cp>\u003Cb>\nQualifications:\u003C\u002Fb>\u003C\u002Fp>\u003Cp>\nPursuing a bachelor&rsquo;s degree in a related discipline required A degree in one of the following majors preferred:\u003C\u002Fp>\u003Cul>\u003Cli>\nComputer Science\u003C\u002Fli>\u003Cli>\nComputer Engineering\u003C\u002Fli>\u003Cli>\nElectrical Engineering\u003C\u002Fli>\u003Cli>\nMechanical Engineering with controls concentration\u003C\u002Fli>\u003C\u002Ful>\u003Cp>\nCompletion of Degree prior start date required.\u003C\u002Fp>\u003Cp>\nPrior completion of a Co-Op with a utility equipment manufacturing company highly preferred.\u003C\u002Fp>\u003Cp>\nEIT registration or ability to obtain registration for engineering degrees required.\u003C\u002Fp>\u003Cp>\nExperience with telematic control systems preferred.\u003C\u002Fp>\u003Cp>\nExperience with CAN communication is preferred.\n\u003C\u002Fp>\u003Cp>Experience with embedded C software design on microcontrollers \u003Cb>highly preferred\u003C\u002Fb>.\n\u003C\u002Fp>\u003Cp>\u003Cb>Prior interaction with Altec team at a recruitment event or previous intern\u002FCoop experience with Altec highly preferred.\u003C\u002Fb>\u003C\u002Fp>\u003Cp>\u003Cb>\u003Cbr>\nPotential Responsibilities:\u003C\u002Fb>\u003C\u002Fp>\u003Cul>\u003Cli>\nParticipate on design teams to develop and test control software for Altec products.\u003C\u002Fli>\u003Cli>\nDesign and develop printed circuit board assemblies and electronic modules.\u003C\u002Fli>\u003Cli>\nReview electrical component specification and application for compatibility.\u003C\u002Fli>\u003Cli>\nReview and create control system electrical schematics.\u003C\u002Fli>\u003Cli>\nEvaluate and test chassis interface with supplier components.\u003C\u002Fli>\u003Cli>\nWork with remote team members to maintain product architecture.\u003C\u002Fli>\u003Cli>\nUtilize data loggers to troubleshoot equipment and evaluate new designs.\u003C\u002Fli>\u003Cli>\nEmbedded system design and component selection.\u003C\u002Fli>\u003Cli>\nBecome part of Altec&rsquo;s team-oriented design, manufacture, and customer service\u002Fsupport efforts.\u003C\u002Fli>\u003Cli>\nCommunicate with customers on issues of technical specifications, product design and operation.\u003C\u002Fli>\u003Cli>\nProvide technical support to sales associates.\u003C\u002Fli>\u003Cli>\nSupport Operations, Sales, and Service.\u003C\u002Fli>\u003Cli>\nParticipate in Continuous Improvement Initiatives.\u003C\u002Fli>\u003C\u002Ful>\u003Cp>\u003Cb>\nAltec offers a competitive salary that rewards performance and dedication, along with a comprehensive benefits package that includes:\u003C\u002Fb>\u003C\u002Fp>\u003Cul>\u003Cli>\nMedical, Dental and Prescription Drug Program\u003C\u002Fli>\u003Cli>\nRetirement 401(k) Program\u003C\u002Fli>\u003Cli>\nVacation and Holidays\u003C\u002Fli>\u003Cli>\nFlexible Spending Accounts\u003C\u002Fli>\u003Cli>\nTuition Assistance Program\u003C\u002Fli>\u003Cli>\nEmployee Assistance and Mental Health\u002FSubstance Abuse Program\u003C\u002Fli>\u003Cli>\nLife Insurance, Accidental Death and Dismemberment Insurance\u003C\u002Fli>\u003C\u002Ful>\u003Cp>\u003Ci>\u003Cbr>\nAltec Industries, Inc. and its affiliates are equal opportunity employers and maintain affirmative action plans to recruit, retain, develop, and promote qualified individuals without unlawful consideration of race, gender, color, religion, sexual orientation, national origin, age, disability, citizenship status, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state or local law. Altec strives to maintain a work environment free from unlawful discrimination and harassment, where associates are treated with respect and dignity.\u003C\u002Fi>\u003C\u002Fp>\u003C\u002Fdiv>","text":"Why Join Altec?\n\nAltec is looking for Controls Developer to join the team located in St. Joseph, Mo. As a Controls Developer you will design, build, and test customer-specific electrical systems, and design using simulation and model-based design.\n\nCustomer First - Enjoyment of Work - Family- Financial Stability - Integrity - People Are Our Greatest Strength - Quality - Spiritual Development - Teamwork\n\nQualifications:\n\nPursuing a bachelor’s degree in a related discipline required A degree in one of the following majors preferred:\n\nComputer Science\nComputer Engineering\nElectrical Engineering\nMechanical Engineering with controls concentration\n\nCompletion of Degree prior start date required.\n\nPrior completion of a Co-Op with a utility equipment manufacturing company highly preferred.\n\nEIT registration or ability to obtain registration for engineering degrees required.\n\nExperience with telematic control systems preferred.\n\nExperience with CAN communication is preferred.\n\nExperience with embedded C software design on microcontrollers highly preferred.\n\nPrior interaction with Altec team at a recruitment event or previous intern\u002FCoop experience with Altec highly preferred.\n\nPotential Responsibilities:\n\nParticipate on design teams to develop and test control software for Altec products.\nDesign and develop printed circuit board assemblies and electronic modules.\nReview electrical component specification and application for compatibility.\nReview and create control system electrical schematics.\nEvaluate and test chassis interface with supplier components.\nWork with remote team members to maintain product architecture.\nUtilize data loggers to troubleshoot equipment and evaluate new designs.\nEmbedded system design and component selection.\nBecome part of Altec’s team-oriented design, manufacture, and customer service\u002Fsupport efforts.\nCommunicate with customers on issues of technical specifications, product design and operation.\nProvide technical support to sales associates.\nSupport Operations, Sales, and Service.\nParticipate in Continuous Improvement Initiatives.\n\nAltec offers a competitive salary that rewards performance and dedication, along with a comprehensive benefits package that includes:\n\nMedical, Dental and Prescription Drug Program\nRetirement 401(k) Program\nVacation and Holidays\nFlexible Spending Accounts\nTuition Assistance Program\nEmployee Assistance and Mental Health\u002FSubstance Abuse Program\nLife Insurance, Accidental Death and Dismemberment Insurance\n\nAltec Industries, Inc. and its affiliates are equal opportunity employers and maintain affirmative action plans to recruit, retain, develop, and promote qualified individuals without unlawful consideration of race, gender, color, religion, sexual orientation, national origin, age, disability, citizenship status, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state or local law. Altec strives to maintain a work environment free from unlawful discrimination and harassment, where associates are treated with respect and dignity.","semanticSegments":[]},"location":{"__typename":"JobLocation","countryCode":"US","admin1Code":"MO","admin1Name":"Missouri","admin2Code":"021","admin2Name":"Buchanan County","admin3Code":null,"admin3Name":null,"admin4Code":null,"admin4Name":null,"city":"Saint Software & Firmware Developers","suid":"AFCY5"}}],"attributeIdsMapping":[]}}]}},"errors":[],"query":"query getViewJobJobData($jobKeyString: String!, $shouldQueryCogsEligibility: Boolean!, $shouldQuerySavedJob: Boolean!, $shouldQueryTitleNorm: Boolean!, $shouldQueryCompanyFields: Boolean!, $shouldQuerySalary: Boolean!, $shouldQueryIndeedApplyLink: Boolean!, $shouldQueryParentEmployer: Boolean!, $shouldQuerySentiment: Boolean!, $shouldIncludeFragmentZone: Boolean!, $shouldQueryMatchComparison: Boolean!, $shouldQueryApplicantInsights: Boolean!, $shouldQueryContactEmail: Boolean!, $shouldQueryEmployerOutreachEngagements: Boolean! = false, $shouldQueryApplyRateLimit: Boolean! = false, $shouldQueryJapanInternshipMetadata: Boolean! = false, $source: String!, $mobvjtk: String!, $continueUrl: String!, $spn: Boolean!, $jobDataInput: JobDataInput!, $resumeEngagementsAfter: String = null, $resumeEngagementsInput: FindResumeEngagementsInput! = {}, $clientMeta: String) {\n  jobData(input: $jobDataInput) {\n    __typename\n    results {\n      __typename\n      trackingKey\n      job {\n        __typename\n        key\n        ...jobDataFields\n        ...titleNormFields@include(if: $shouldQueryTitleNorm)\n        ...savedJobFields@include(if: $shouldQuerySavedJob)\n        ...companyFields@include(if: $shouldQueryCompanyFields)\n        ...parentEmployerFields@include(if: $shouldQueryParentEmployer)\n        jobSearchMobileMigrationData @include(if: $shouldQuerySentiment) {\n          __typename\n          knownUserSentimentIdMap {\n            __typename\n            id\n            suid\n          }\n          userStringDislikedPreferences {\n            __typename\n            uid\n          }\n          userMinimumPayPreferences {\n            __typename\n            currency\n            payAmount\n            salaryType\n          }\n          preferencesFetchStatus\n          paySentiment\n        }\n        jobTypes: attributes(customClass: \"BM62A\") {\n          __typename\n          key\n          label\n          sentiment @include(if: $shouldQuerySentiment)\n        }\n        shiftAndSchedule: attributes(customClass: \"BTSWR\") {\n          __typename\n          key\n          label\n          sentiment @include(if: $shouldQuerySentiment)\n        }\n        compensation @include(if: $shouldQuerySalary) {\n          __typename\n          key\n        }\n        indeedApply @include(if: $shouldQueryIndeedApplyLink) {\n          __typename\n          applyLink(property: INDEED, trackingKeys: {mobvjtk : $mobvjtk}, continueUrl: $continueUrl, spn: $spn, clientMeta: $clientMeta, source: $source) {\n            __typename\n            url\n            iaUid\n          }\n        }\n        ...japanInternshipFields@include(if: $shouldQueryJapanInternshipMetadata)\n        ...ViewJobFragmentZone@include(if: $shouldIncludeFragmentZone)\n        applicants @include(if: $shouldQueryApplicantInsights) {\n          __typename\n          hasInsights\n          ...ApplicantDemographicsFields\n        }\n      }\n      matchComparisonResult @include(if: $shouldQueryMatchComparison) {\n        __typename\n        attributeComparisons {\n          __typename\n          jobProvenance\n          attribute {\n            __typename\n            interestedParty\n            label\n            lastModified\n            suid\n            profileAttributeTypeSuid\n          }\n          jobRequirementStrength\n          jsProvenance\n          matchType\n        }\n        encouragementToApply {\n          __typename\n          score\n          strategy\n          trafficLight\n        }\n        occupationComparisons {\n          __typename\n          jsProvenance\n          matchType\n          occupation {\n            __typename\n            label\n            suid\n          }\n        }\n        attributeIdsMapping {\n          __typename\n          id\n          suid\n          sentiment\n        }\n      }\n    }\n  }\n  cogsCheckEligibility(input: {jobKey : $jobKeyString}) @include(if: $shouldQueryCogsEligibility) {\n    __typename\n    error\n    isEligible\n  }\n  jobSeekerProfile @include(if: $shouldQueryApplicantInsights) {\n    __typename\n    profile {\n      __typename\n      subscription {\n        __typename\n        status\n      }\n      jsProPremiumAccess {\n        __typename\n        applicantInsights {\n          __typename\n          access\n          branding\n        }\n      }\n    }\n  }\n  findResumeEngagements(first: 50, after: $resumeEngagementsAfter, input: $resumeEngagementsInput) @include(if: $shouldQueryEmployerOutreachEngagements) {\n    __typename\n    engagements {\n      __typename\n      id\n      sender {\n        __typename\n        name\n        email\n        id\n      }\n      status\n      createdDate\n      type\n      recipient {\n        __typename\n        id\n        email\n        phoneNumber\n      }\n      job {\n        __typename\n        title\n        company\n        description\n        employerJobId\n        htmlDescription\n      }\n      conversation {\n        __typename\n        key\n        initialMessage {\n          __typename\n          id\n          textBody\n          htmlBody\n        }\n      }\n      statusHistory {\n        __typename\n        status\n        timestamp\n        modifiedDate\n      }\n      feedback {\n        __typename\n        declineReason\n        comment\n      }\n      fullApplyRequested\n    }\n  }\n  assessRiskForContexts(input: {contexts : [JS_APPLY_START_RATE_LIMIT]}) @include(if: $shouldQueryApplyRateLimit) {\n    __typename\n    action\n    limitInfo {\n      __typename\n      limit\n      remaining\n    }\n  }\n}\n\nfragment jobDataFields on Job {\n  __typename\n  title\n  sourceEmployerName\n  datePublished\n  expired\n  language\n  normalizedTitle\n  refNum\n  expirationDate\n  sponsoredEmployerKey\n  tracking {\n    __typename\n    jobClick {\n      __typename\n      url\n    }\n  }\n  source {\n    __typename\n    key\n    name\n  }\n  feed {\n    __typename\n    key\n    isDradis\n    feedSourceType\n  }\n  url\n  dateOnIndeed\n  description {\n    __typename\n    html\n    text\n    semanticSegments {\n      __typename\n      content\n      header\n      label\n    }\n  }\n  location {\n    __typename\n    countryCode\n    admin1Code\n    admin1Name\n    admin2Code\n    admin2Name\n    admin3Code\n    admin3Name\n    admin4Code\n    admin4Name\n    city\n    postalCode\n    latitude\n    longitude\n    streetAddress\n    fullAddress\n    formatted {\n      __typename\n      long\n      short\n    }\n  }\n  occupations {\n    __typename\n    key\n    label\n  }\n  occupationMostLikelySuids: occupations(occupationOption: MOST_LIKELY) {\n    __typename\n    key\n  }\n  benefits: attributes(customClass: \"SXMYH\") {\n    __typename\n    key\n    label\n  }\n  socialInsurance: attributes(customClass: \"KTQQ7\") {\n    __typename\n    key\n    label\n  }\n  workingSystem: attributes(customClass: \"TY4DY\") {\n    __typename\n    key\n    label\n  }\n  requiredDocumentsCategorizedAttributes: attributes(customClass: \"PQCTE\") {\n    __typename\n    key\n    label\n  }\n  indeedApply {\n    __typename\n    key\n    scopes\n  }\n  attributes {\n    __typename\n    key\n    label\n  }\n  employerProvidedAttributes: attributes(sources: [EMPLOYER]) {\n    __typename\n    key\n    label\n  }\n  employerProvidedOccupations: occupations(sources: [EMPLOYER], occupationOption: MOST_SPECIFIC) {\n    __typename\n    label\n  }\n  hiringDemand {\n    __typename\n    isUrgentHire\n    isHighVolumeHiring\n  }\n  thirdPartyTrackingUrls\n  jobSearchMobileMigrationData {\n    __typename\n    advertiserId\n    jobTypeId\n    applyEmail\n    applyUrl\n    contactEmail @include(if: $shouldQueryContactEmail)\n    contactPhone\n    isNoUniqueUrl\n    urlRewriteRule\n    mapDisplayType\n    jobTags\n    locCountry\n    waldoVisibilityLevel\n    isKnownSponsoredOnDesktop\n    isKnownSponsoredOnMobile\n    tpiaAdvNum\n    tpiaApiToken\n    tpiaCoverLetter\n    tpiaEmail\n    tpiaFinishAppUrl\n    tpiaJobCompanyName\n    tpiaJobId\n    tpiaJobLocation\n    tpiaJobMeta\n    tpiaJobTitle\n    tpiaLocale\n    tpiaName\n    tpiaPhone\n    tpiaPostUrl\n    tpiaPresent\n    tpiaResume\n    tpiaResumeFieldsOptional\n    tpiaResumeFieldsRequired\n    tpiaScreenerQuestions\n    iaVisibility\n Link to 1,006 company reviews (opens in a new tab)","count":1006,"countContent":"1,006 reviews","descriptionContent":"Read what people are saying about working here.","rating":3.4,"showCount":true,"showDescription":true,"size":null}},"employerActivity":null,"employerProvidedOccupations":[],"employerResponsiveCardModel":{"averageResponseInDays":1,"description":"Responded to 75% or more applications in the past 30 days, typically within 1 day.","headline":null,"responseRate":0.77},"encryptedFccCompanyId":null,"formattedLocation":"Saint Joseph, MO 64507","hideRating":false,"isCondensedRating":true,"isDesktopApplyButtonSticky":false,"isSimpleVjImproveActive":true,"isSimplifiedHeader":false,"jobFlairLabelModel":null,"jobNormTitle":null,"jobTitle":"Core Controls Developer","jobTypes":null,"location":null,"openCompanyLinksInNewTab":false,"parentCompanyName":null,"ratingsModel":null,"recentSearch":null,"remoteLocation":false,"remoteWorkModel":null,"salaryCurrency":null,"salaryMax":null,"salaryMin":null,"salaryType":null,"subtitle":"Altec Industries, Inc. - Saint Joseph, MO 64507","tagModels":null,"taxonomyAttributes":null,"viewJobDisplay":"DESKTOP_EMBEDDED"},"jobMetadataHeaderModel":{"jobType":"Full-time"},"jobTagModel":null,"resumeEvaluationResult":null,"sanitizedJobDescription":"\u003Cdiv>\n \u003Cp>\u003Cb>Why Join Altec?\u003C\u002Fb>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>Altec is looking for \u003Cb>Controls Developer\u003C\u002Fb> to join the team located in St. Joseph, Mo. As a Controls Developer you will design, build, and test customer-specific electrical systems, and design using simulation and model-based design.\u003Cbr>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>\u003Cbr>\n   Customer First - Enjoyment of Work - Family- Financial Stability - Integrity - People Are Our Greatest Strength - Quality - Spiritual Development - Teamwork\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>\u003Cb> Qualifications:\u003C\u002Fb>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>Pursuing a bachelor’s degree in a related discipline required A degree in one of the following majors preferred:\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>Computer Science\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Computer Engineering\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Electrical Engineering\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Mechanical Engineering with controls concentration\u003C\u002Fli>\n \u003C\u002Ful>\n \u003Cp>Completion of Degree prior start date required.\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>Prior completion of a Co-Op with a utility equipment manufacturing company highly preferred.\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>EIT registration or ability to obtain registration for engineering degrees required.\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>Experience with telematic control systems preferred.\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>Experience with CAN communication is preferred.\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>Experience with embedded C software design on microcontrollers \u003Cb>highly preferred\u003C\u002Fb>.\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>\u003Cb>Prior interaction with Altec team at a recruitment event or previous intern\u002FCoop experience with Altec highly preferred.\u003C\u002Fb>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>\u003Cb>\u003Cbr>\n    Potential Responsibilities:\u003C\u002Fb>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>Participate on design teams to develop and test control software for Altec products.\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Design and develop printed circuit board assemblies and electronic modules.\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Review electrical component specification and application for compatibility.\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Review and create control system electrical schematics.\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Evaluate and test chassis interface with supplier components.\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Work with remote team members to maintain product architecture.\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Utilize data loggers to troubleshoot equipment and evaluate new designs.\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Embedded system design and component selection.\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Become part of Altec’s team-oriented design, manufacture, and customer service\u002Fsupport efforts.\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Communicate with customers on issues of technical specifications, product design and operation.\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Provide technical support to sales associates.\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Support Operations, Sales, and Service.\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Participate in Continuous Improvement Initiatives.\u003C\u002Fli>\n \u003C\u002Ful>\n \u003Cp>\u003Cb> Altec offers a competitive salary that rewards performance and dedication, along with a comprehensive benefits package that includes:\u003C\u002Fb>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>Medical, Dental and Prescription Drug Program\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Retirement 401(k) Program\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Vacation and Holidays\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Flexible Spending Accounts\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Tuition Assistance Program\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Employee Assistance and Mental Health\u002FSubstance Abuse Program\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Life Insurance, Accidental Death and Dismemberment Insurance\u003C\u002Fli>\n \u003C\u002Ful>\n \u003Cp>\u003Ci>\u003Cbr>\n    Altec Industries, Inc. and its affiliates are equal opportunity employers and maintain affirmative action plans to recruit, retain, develop, and promote qualified individuals without unlawful consideration of race, gender, color, religion, sexual orientation, national origin, age, disability, citizenship status, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state or local law. Altec strives to maintain a work environment free from unlawful discrimination and harassment, where associates are treated with respect and dignity.\u003C\u002Fi>\u003C\u002Fp>\n\u003C\u002Fdiv>","showExpiredHeader":false,"structuredDataJobSummaryModel":null,"tagModels":null,"viewJobDisplay":"DESKTOP_EMBEDDED"},"sectionedJobInfoModel":null},"jobKey":"d8fdfdcc049195d2","jobLanguage":"en","jobLocation":"Saint Joseph, MO 64507","jobMetadataFooterModel":{"advertiserName":"","age":"1 day .mosaic-provider-reportcontent-1hfwffs{box-sizing:border-box;background:none;appearance:none;text-align:start;text-decoration:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;user-select:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;position:relative;margin-block-start:0;margin-block-end:0;margin-inline-start:0;margin-inline-end:0;padding-inline-start:1rem;padding-inline-end:1rem;line-height:1.5;font-family:'Indeed .mosaic-provider-reportcontent-1hfwffs{box-sizing:border-box;background:none;appearance:none;text-align:start;text-decoration:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;user-select:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;position:relative;margin-block-start:0;margin-block-end:0;margin-inline-start:0;margin-inline-end:0;padding-inline-start:1rem;padding-inline-end:1rem;line-height:1.5;font-family:\\u0027Indeed Sans\\u0027,\\u0027Noto Sans\\u0027,\\u0027Helvetica Neue\\u0027,Helvetica,Arial,\\u0027Liberation Sans\\u0027,Roboto,Noto,sans-serif;font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;border-radius:0.75rem;transition:border-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.645, 0.045, 0.355, 1),background-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.645, 0.045, 0.355, 1),opacity 200ms cubic-bezier(0.645, 0.045, 0.355, 1),box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.645, 0.045, 0.355, 1),color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.645, 0.045, 0.355, 1),z-index 200ms cubic-bezier(0.645, 0.045, 0.355, 1);display:inline-flex;inline-size:auto;padding-block-start:0.5625rem;padding-block-end:0.5625rem;min-block-size:2.75rem;color:var(--ifl-colors-foreground-strong);background-color:var(--ifl-colors-background-action-weak);}.mosaic-provider-reportcontent .mosaic-provider-reportcontent-1hfwffs::-moz-focus-inner{border:0;}@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce){.mosaic-provider-reportcontent .mosaic-provider-reportcontent-1hfwffs{transition:none;}}.mosaic-provider-reportcontent .mosaic-provider-reportcontent-1hfwffs:disabled{opacity:0.4;pointer-events:none;}.mosaic-provider-reportcontent .mosaic-provider-reportcontent-1hfwffs:focus-visible{outline:none;box-shadow:var(--ifl-shadows-focus);}.mosaic-provider-reportcontent .mosaic-provider-reportcontent-1hfwffs[aria-disabled=\\u0027true\\u0027]{cursor:default;}.mosaic-provider-reportcontent .mosaic-provider-reportcontent-1hfwffs:visited{color:var(--ifl-colors-foreground-strong);}.mosaic-provider-reportcontent .mosaic-provider-reportcontent-1hfwffs:hover:not([aria-disabled=\\u0027true\\u0027]){color:var(--ifl-colors-foreground-strong);background-color:var(--ifl-colors-background-action-weak-hover);}.mosaic-provider-reportcontent .mosaic-provider-reportcontent-1hfwffs:active:not([aria-disabled=\\u0027true\\u0027]){color:var(--ifl-colors-foreground-strong);box-shadow:var(--ifl-shadows-inset);background-color:var(--ifl-colors-background-action-weak-active);}.mosaic-provider-reportcontent .mosaic-provider-reportcontent-1hfwffs[aria-disabled=\\u0027true\\u0027]{background-color:rgba(243,242,241,0.4);color:rgba(45,45,45,0.4);}\\u003C\\u002Fstyle\\u003E\\u003Cbutton .mosaic-provider-reportcontent-1hfwffs{box-sizing:border-box;background:none;appearance:none;text-align:start;text-decoration:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;user-select:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;position:relative;margin-block-start:0;margin-block-end:0;margin-inline-start:0;margin-inline-end:0;padding-inline-start:1rem;padding-inline-end:1rem;line-height:1.5;font-family:'Indeed 1);display:inline-flex;inline-size:auto;padding-block-start:0.5625rem;padding-block-end:0.5625rem;min-block-size:2.75rem;color:var(--ifl-colors-foreground-strong);background-color:var(--ifl-colors-background-action-weak);}.mosaic-provider-reportcontent .mosaic-provider-reportcontent-1hfwffs::-moz-focus-inner{border:0;}@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce){.mosaic-provider-reportcontent .mosaic-provider-reportcontent-1hfwffs[aria-disabled='true']{cursor:default;}.mosaic-provider-reportcontent .mosaic-provider-reportcontent-1hfwffs:visited{color:var(--ifl-colors-foreground-strong);}.mosaic-provider-reportcontent As a Controls Developer you will design, build, and test customer-specific electrical systems, and design using simulation and model-based design.\u003Cbr>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>\u003Cbr>\n   Customer First - Enjoyment of Work - Family- Financial Stability - Integrity - People Are Our Greatest Strength - Quality - Spiritual Development - Teamwork\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>\u003Cb> Qualifications:\u003C\u002Fb>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>Pursuing a bachelor’s degree in a related discipline required A degree in one of the following majors preferred:\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>Computer Science\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Computer Engineering\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Electrical Engineering\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Mechanical Engineering with controls concentration\u003C\u002Fli>\n \u003C\u002Ful>\n \u003Cp>Completion of Degree prior start date required.\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>Prior completion of a Co-Op with a utility equipment manufacturing company highly preferred.\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>EIT registration or ability to obtain registration for engineering degrees required.\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>Experience with telematic control systems preferred.\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>Experience with CAN communication is preferred.\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>Experience with embedded C software design on microcontrollers \u003Cb>highly preferred\u003C\u002Fb>.\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>\u003Cb>Prior interaction with Altec team at a recruitment event or previous intern\u002FCoop experience with Altec highly preferred.\u003C\u002Fb>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>\u003Cb>\u003Cbr>\n    Potential Responsibilities:\u003C\u002Fb>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>Participate on design teams to develop and test control software for Altec products.\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Design and develop printed circuit board assemblies and electronic modules.\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Review electrical component specification and application for compatibility.\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Review and create control system electrical schematics.\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Evaluate and test chassis interface with supplier components.\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Work with remote team members to maintain product architecture.\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Utilize data loggers to troubleshoot equipment and evaluate new designs.\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Embedded system design and component selection.\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Become part of Altec’s team-oriented design, manufacture, and customer service\u002Fsupport efforts.\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Communicate with customers on issues of technical specifications, product design and operation.\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Provide technical support to sales associates.\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Support Operations, Sales, and Service.\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Participate in Continuous Improvement Initiatives.\u003C\u002Fli>\n \u003C\u002Ful>\n \u003Cp>\u003Cb> Altec offers a competitive salary that rewards performance and dedication, along with a comprehensive benefits package that includes:\u003C\u002Fb>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>Medical, Dental and Prescription Drug Program\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Retirement 401(k) Program\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Vacation and Holidays\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Flexible Spending Accounts\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Tuition Assistance Program\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Employee Assistance and Mental Health\u002FSubstance Abuse Program\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Life Insurance, Accidental Death and Dismemberment Insurance\u003C\u002Fli>\n \u003C\u002Ful>\n \u003Cp>\u003Ci>\u003Cbr>\n    Altec Industries, Inc. and its affiliates are equal opportunity employers and maintain affirmative action plans to recruit, retain, develop, and promote qualified individuals without unlawful consideration of race, gender, color, religion, sexual orientation, national origin, age, disability, citizenship status, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state or local law. Altec strives to maintain a work environment free from unlawful discrimination and harassment, where associates are treated with respect and dignity.\u003C\u002Fi>\u003C\u002Fp>\n\u003C\u002Fdiv>","showExpiredHeader":false,"structuredDataJobSummaryModel":null,"tagModels":null,"viewJobDisplay":"DESKTOP_EMBEDDED"},"sectionedJobInfoModel":null},"mobtk":"1jo9oaha7gf8m800","profileBaseUrl":"https:\u002F\u002Fprofile.indeed.com","rtl":false,"salaryInfoModel":null},"resumeWordCount":0,"jobDescription":"\u003Cdiv>\u003Cp>\u003Cb>Why Join Altec?\u003C\u002Fb>\n\u003C\u002Fp>\u003Cp>Altec is looking for \u003Cb>Controls Developer\u003C\u002Fb> to join the team located in St. Joseph, Mo. As a Controls Developer you will design, build, and test customer-specific electrical systems, and design using simulation and model-based design.\u003Cbr>\n\u003C\u002Fp>\u003Cp>\u003Cbr>\nCustomer First - Enjoyment of Work - Family- Financial Stability - Integrity - People Are Our Greatest Strength - Quality - Spiritual Development - Teamwork\u003C\u002Fp>\u003Cp>\u003Cb>\nQualifications:\u003C\u002Fb>\u003C\u002Fp>\u003Cp>\nPursuing a bachelor&rsquo;s degree in a related discipline required A degree in one of the following majors preferred:\u003C\u002Fp>\u003Cul>\u003Cli>\nComputer Science\u003C\u002Fli>\u003Cli>\nComputer Engineering\u003C\u002Fli>\u003Cli>\nElectrical Engineering\u003C\u002Fli>\u003Cli>\nMechanical equipment manufacturing company highly preferred.\u003C\u002Fp>\u003Cp>\nEIT registration or ability to obtain registration for engineering degrees required.\u003C\u002Fp>\u003Cp>\nExperience with telematic control systems preferred.\u003C\u002Fp>\u003Cp>\nExperience with CAN communication is preferred.\n\u003C\u002Fp>\u003Cp>Experience with embedded C software design on microcontrollers \u003Cb>highly preferred\u003C\u002Fb>.\n\u003C\u002Fp>\u003Cp>\u003Cb>Prior interaction with Altec team at a recruitment event or previous intern\u002FCoop experience with Altec highly preferred.\u003C\u002Fb>\u003C\u002Fp>\u003Cp>\u003Cb>\u003Cbr>\nPotential Responsibilities:\u003C\u002Fb>\u003C\u002Fp>\u003Cul>\u003Cli>\nParticipate on design teams to develop and test control software for Altec products.\u003C\u002Fli>\u003Cli>\nDesign and develop printed circuit board assemblies and electronic modules.\u003C\u002Fli>\u003Cli>\nReview electrical component specification and application for compatibility.\u003C\u002Fli>\u003Cli>\nReview and create control system electrical schematics.\u003C\u002Fli>\u003Cli>\nEvaluate and test chassis interface with supplier components.\u003C\u002Fli>\u003Cli>\nWork with remote team members to maintain product architecture.\u003C\u002Fli>\u003Cli>\nUtilize data loggers to troubleshoot equipment and evaluate new designs.\u003C\u002Fli>\u003Cli>\nEmbedded system design and component selection.\u003C\u002Fli>\u003Cli>\nBecome part of Altec&rsquo;s team-oriented design, manufacture, and customer Initiatives.\u003C\u002Fli>\u003C\u002Ful>\u003Cp>\u003Cb>\nAltec offers a competitive salary that rewards performance and dedication, along with a comprehensive benefits package that Customer First - Enjoyment of Work - Family- Financial Stability - Integrity - People Are Our Greatest Strength - Quality - Spiritual Development - Teamwork\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>\u003Cb> Qualifications:\u003C\u002Fb>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>Pursuing a bachelor’s degree in a related discipline required A degree in one of the following majors preferred:\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>Computer Science\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Computer Engineering\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Electrical Engineering\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Mechanical Engineering with controls concentration\u003C\u002Fli>\n \u003C\u002Ful>\n \u003Cp>Completion of Degree prior start date required.\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>Prior completion of a Co-Op with a utility equipment manufacturing preferred.\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>Experience with CAN communication is preferred.\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>Experience with embedded C software design on microcontrollers \u003Cb>highly preferred\u003C\u002Fb>.\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>\u003Cb>Prior interaction with Altec team at a recruitment event or previous intern\u002FCoop experience with Altec highly specification and application for compatibility.\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Review and create control system electrical schematics.\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Evaluate and test chassis interface with supplier components.\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Work with remote team members to maintain product architecture.\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Utilize data loggers to troubleshoot equipment and evaluate software for Altec products.\u003C\u002Fli>\u003Cli>\nDesign and develop printed circuit board assemblies and electronic modules.\u003C\u002Fli>\u003Cli>\nReview electrical component specification and application for compatibility.\u003C\u002Fli>\u003Cli>\nReview and create control system electrical schematics.\u003C\u002Fli>\u003Cli>\nEvaluate and test chassis interface with supplier components.\u003C\u002Fli>\u003Cli>\nWork with remote team members to maintain product architecture.\u003C\u002Fli>\u003Cli>\nUtilize data loggers to troubleshoot equipment and evaluate new designs.\u003C\u002Fli>\u003Cli>\nEmbedded system design and component selection.\u003C\u002Fli>\u003Cli>\nBecome part of Altec&rsquo;s team-oriented design, manufacture, and customer service\u002Fsupport efforts.\u003C\u002Fli>\u003Cli>\nCommunicate with customers on issues of technical specifications, product design and operation.\u003C\u002Fli>\u003Cli>\nProvide technical support to sales associates.\u003C\u002Fli>\u003Cli>\nSupport Operations, Sales, and Service.\u003C\u002Fli>\u003Cli>\nParticipate in Continuous Improvement Initiatives.\u003C\u002Fli>\u003C\u002Ful>\u003Cp>\u003Cb>\nAltec offers a competitive salary that rewards performance and dedication, along with a comprehensive benefits package that includes:\u003C\u002Fb>\u003C\u002Fp>\u003Cul>\u003Cli>\nMedical, Dental and Prescription Drug Program\u003C\u002Fli>\u003Cli>\nRetirement 401(k) Program\u003C\u002Fli>\u003Cli>\nVacation and Holidays\u003C\u002Fli>\u003Cli>\nFlexible Spending Accounts\u003C\u002Fli>\u003Cli>\nTuition Assistance Program\u003C\u002Fli>\u003Cli>\nEmployee Assistance and Mental Health\u002FSubstance Abuse Program\u003C\u002Fli>\u003Cli>\nLife Insurance, Accidental Death and Dismemberment Insurance\u003C\u002Fli>\u003C\u002Ful>\u003Cp>\u003Ci>\u003Cbr>\nAltec Industries, Inc. and its affiliates are equal opportunity employers and maintain affirmative action plans to recruit, retain, develop, and promote qualified individuals without unlawful consideration of race, gender, color, religion, sexual orientation, national origin, age, disability, citizenship status, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state or local law. Altec strives to maintain a work environment free from unlawful discrimination and harassment, where associates are treated with respect and             window._jsf = true;

            window.addEventListener('pageshow', function(e) {
                if (window.performance && typeof window.performance.getEntriesByType === 'function') {
                    const perfEntries = window.performance.getEntriesByType('navigation');
                    if (perfEntries && perfEntries.length > 0 && perfEntries[0].type === 'back_forward') {
                        window['_bk'] = '1';
                    }
                }
                if (e.persisted) {
                    window['_bk'] = '1';
                }
            });
        </script>

                                from {
                                    opacity: 1;
                                }
                                to {
                                    opacity: 0;
                                }
                            }

                            @keyframes fadeInAnimationKeyframes {
                                from {
                                    opacity: 0;
                                }
                                to {
                                    opacity: 1;
                                }
                            }

                            @keyframes moveUpAnimationKeyframes {
                                from {
                                    transform: translateY(0);
                                }
                                to {
                                    transform: translateY(-0px);
                                }
                            }

                            @keyframes moveDownAnimationKeyframes {
                                from {
                                    transform: translateY(-0px);
                                }
                                to {
                                    transform: translateY(0);
                                }
                            }

                            @keyframes embeddedViewJobMoveUpAnimationKeyframes {
                                from {
                                    margin-top: 0px;
                                }
                                to {

                                from {

                                }

aria-orientation="horizontal" class="serp-page-hwvpa9 e15p7aqh1"><span class="serp-page-8u2krs esbq1260"><span>&amp;nbsp;</span></span></div></div><div id="jobDescriptionTitle"><h2 tabindex="-1" id="jobDescriptionTitleHeading" class="css-15dd00f e1tiznh50">Full job description</h2></div><div id="jobDescriptionText" class="jobsearch-JobComponent-description css-jsfa0i eu4oa1w0"><div>
 <p><b>Why Join Altec?</b></p>
 <p>Altec is looking for <b>Controls Developer</b> to join the team located in St. Joseph, Mo. As a Controls Developer you will design, build, and test customer-specific electrical systems, and design using simulation and model-based design.<br></p>
 <p><br>
   Customer First - Enjoyment of Work - Family- Financial Stability - Integrity - People Are Our Greatest Strength - Quality - Spiritual Development - Teamwork</p>
 <p><b> Qualifications:</b></p>
 <p>Pursuing a bachelor’s degree in a related discipline required A degree in one of the following majors preferred:</p>
 <ul>
  <li>Computer Science</li>
  <li>Computer Engineering</li>
  <li>Electrical Engineering</li>
  <li>Mechanical Engineering with controls concentration</li>
 </ul>
 <p>Completion of Degree prior start date required.</p>
 <p>Prior completion of a Co-Op with a utility equipment manufacturing company highly preferred.</p>
 <p>EIT registration or ability to obtain registration for engineering degrees required.</p>
 <p>Experience with telematic control systems preferred.</p>
 <p>Experience with CAN communication is preferred.</p>
 <p>Experience with embedded C software design on microcontrollers <b>highly preferred</b>.</p>
 <p><b>Prior interaction with Altec team at a recruitment event or previous intern/Coop experience with Altec highly preferred.</b></p>
 <p><b><br>
    Potential Responsibilities:</b></p>
 <ul>
  <li>Participate on design teams to develop and test control software for Altec products.</li>
  <li>Design and develop printed circuit board assemblies and electronic modules.</li>
  <li>Review electrical component specification and application for compatibility.</li>
  <li>Review and create control system electrical schematics.</li>
  <li>Evaluate and test chassis interface with supplier components.</li>
  <li>Work with remote team members to maintain product architecture.</li>
  <li>Utilize data loggers to troubleshoot equipment and evaluate new designs.</li>
  <li>Embedded system design and component selection.</li>
  <li>Become part of Altec’s team-oriented design, manufacture, and customer service/support efforts.</li>
  <li>Communicate with customers on issues of technical specifications, product design and operation.</li>
  <li>Provide technical support to sales associates.</li>
  <li>Support Operations, Sales, and Service.</li>
  <li>Participate in Continuous Improvement Initiatives.</li>
 </ul>
 <p><b> Altec offers a competitive salary that rewards performance and dedication, along with a comprehensive benefits package that includes:</b></p>
 <ul>
  <li>Medical, Dental and Prescription Drug Program</li>
  <li>Retirement 401(k) Program</li>
  <li>Vacation and Holidays</li>
  <li>Flexible Spending Accounts</li>
  <li>Tuition Assistance Program</li>
  <li>Employee Assistance and Mental Health/Substance Abuse Program</li>
  <li>Life Insurance, Accidental Death and Dismemberment Insurance</li>
 </ul>
 <p><i><br>
    Altec Industries, Inc. and its affiliates are equal opportunity employers and maintain affirmative action plans to recruit, retain, develop, and promote qualified individuals without unlawful consideration of race, gender, color, religion, sexual orientation, national origin, age, disability, citizenship status, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state or local law. Altec strives to maintain a work environment free from unlawful discrimination and harassment, where associates are treated with respect and dignity.</i></p>
</div></div><div role="separator" aria-orientation="horizontal" class="serp-page-1f63e20 e15p7aqh1"><span class="serp-page-8u2krs esbq1260"><span>&amp;nbsp;</span></span></div></div><div .mosaic-provider-reportcontent-1hfwffs{box-sizing:border-box;background:none;appearance:none;text-align:start;text-decoration:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;user-select:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;position:relative;margin-block-start:0;margin-block-end:0;margin-inline-start:0;margin-inline-end:0;padding-inline-start:1rem;padding-inline-end:1rem;line-height:1.5;font-family:\u0027Indeed Sans\u0027,\u0027Noto Sans\u0027,\u0027Helvetica Neue\u0027,Helvetica,Arial,\u0027Liberation Sans\u0027,Roboto,Noto,sans-serif;font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;border-radius:0.75rem;transition:border-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.645, 0.045, 0.355, 1),background-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.645, 0.045, 0.355, 1),opacity 200ms cubic-bezier(0.645, 0.045, 0.355, 1),box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.645, 0.045, 0.355, 1),color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.645, 0.045, 0.355, 1),z-index 200ms cubic-bezier(0.645, 0.045, 0.355, 1);display:inline-flex;inline-size:auto;padding-block-start:0.5625rem;padding-block-end:0.5625rem;min-block-size:2.75rem;color:var(--ifl-colors-foreground-strong);background-color:var(--ifl-colors-background-action-weak);}.mosaic-provider-reportcontent .mosaic-provider-reportcontent-1hfwffs::-moz-focus-inner{border:0;}@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce){.mosaic-provider-reportcontent .mosaic-provider-reportcontent-1hfwffs{transition:none;}}.mosaic-provider-reportcontent .mosaic-provider-reportcontent-1hfwffs:disabled{opacity:0.4;pointer-events:none;}.mosaic-provider-reportcontent .mosaic-provider-reportcontent-1hfwffs:focus-visible{outline:none;box-shadow:var(--ifl-shadows-focus);}.mosaic-provider-reportcontent .mosaic-provider-reportcontent-1hfwffs[aria-disabled=\u0027true\u0027]{cursor:default;}.mosaic-provider-reportcontent .mosaic-provider-reportcontent-1hfwffs:visited{color:var(--ifl-colors-foreground-strong);}.mosaic-provider-reportcontent .mosaic-provider-reportcontent-1hfwffs:hover:not([aria-disabled=\u0027true\u0027]){color:var(--ifl-colors-foreground-strong);background-color:var(--ifl-colors-background-action-weak-hover);}.mosaic-provider-reportcontent .mosaic-provider-reportcontent-1hfwffs:active:not([aria-disabled=\u0027true\u0027]){color:var(--ifl-colors-foreground-strong);box-shadow:var(--ifl-shadows-inset);background-color:var(--ifl-colors-background-action-weak-active);}.mosaic-provider-reportcontent .mosaic-provider-reportcontent-1hfwffs[aria-disabled=\u0027true\u0027]{background-color:rgba(243,242,241,0.4);color:rgba(45,45,45,0.4);}\u003C\u002Fstyle\u003E\u003Cbutton
